comment: Function tools untuk Vapi/Retell — semua endpoint dilayani integrations/server (ganti BRIDGE_URL dengan URL deploy Anda). Pause-filler ada di 'messages'.

function.name: get_clinic_status
function.description: Get today's clinic status: open/closed right now, today's hours, next Nunavut holiday closure, blizzard mode. Call this before answering ANY question about hours, holidays or weather.

function.name: lookup_patient
function.description: Look up an existing patient by name and/or phone. If caller gave only 7 digits, prepend area code 867. Returns patient record or found=false.

name.description: Full name as the caller said it

messages.content: Let me pull up your record real quick...
Hmm, I'm having trouble with that — let me try once more...

function.name: create_patient
function.description: Register a new patient with minimal info. DOB, insurance details and allergies are collected later via intake form — never block a booking on them.

insurance.description: NIHB, GN plan, Sun Life, etc. or 'none'

messages.content: One moment while I get you set up...

function.name: find_available_slots
function.description: Find bookable slots. Respects clinic hours, Nunavut holidays, Saturday hygiene-only rule, per-operatory conflicts, and blizzard mode (no same-day afternoon slots during a storm). Read at most 3 options aloud.

day_preference.description: Optional weekday the caller prefers, e.g. 'friday'

messages.content: Checking the calendar now — one moment...

function.name: create_appointment
function.description: Book the chosen slot. Returns confirmation with provider and operatory. Reminders (48h + 2h, patient's language) are scheduled automatically.

messages.content: Alright, locking that in for you...

function.name: lookup_appointment
function.description: Find a patient's upcoming appointments (for reschedule/cancel/confirmation questions).

function.name: cancel_appointment
function.description: Cancel an appointment and release the slot to the waitlist. Always offer a new time afterwards.

function.name: escalate_emergency
function.description: EMERGENCY: pages the on-call dentist and front desk immediately, holds the next emergency slot. Use for pain 8+/10, trauma, swelling with fever, uncontrolled bleeding.

messages.content: I'm paging our on-call dentist right now — stay with me...

function.name: log_complaint
function.description: Log a patient complaint verbatim for the practice manager, who calls back within one business day.

function.name: log_call_summary
function.description: ALWAYS call at end of call: writes the conversation summary to the staff dashboard inbox.

destinations.message: Connecting you to our front desk now — one moment.
Connecting you to our on-call dentist right now — please stay on the line.
